# Site in a Box - siteinabox.nl

> Preferred summary: Site in a Box is a Dutch web service for starters, ZZP'ers, freelancers and local businesses that want a professional website without technical setup. Customers receive a first version within 24 hours and go live within 3 working days after approval. The model is no-cure-no-pay: customers only pay after approving the test version. One plan: Site in a Box, billed yearly (€190/year) or monthly (€19/mo).

## Canonical URLs

- [Website](https://siteinabox.nl/)
- [Pricing section](https://siteinabox.nl/#prijzen)
- [How it works](https://siteinabox.nl/#zo-werkt-het)
- [Intake](https://siteinabox.nl/intake/)
- [Contact](https://siteinabox.nl/contact)
- [Admin login helper](https://siteinabox.nl/beheer/)
- [Robots](https://siteinabox.nl/robots.txt)
- [Sitemap index](https://siteinabox.nl/sitemap-index.xml)
- [LLM context file](https://siteinabox.nl/llms.txt)

## What Site in a Box is

Site in a Box is a Dutch web service for net-gestarte ondernemers, ZZP'ers, small local businesses and freelancers who want to be professionally online quickly without technical setup work.

Customers provide a short questionnaire and a few photos. Site in a Box builds the first version, provides a test version on a subdomain, processes feedback, and publishes the site after explicit customer approval. The public promise on the website is: first version within 24 hours, online within 3 working days.

## Target audience

Site in a Box is typically suitable for ZZP service providers, local companies, coaches, tradespeople and freelancers in the Netherlands.

Examples mentioned on the site include kappers, schilders, coaches, fotografen, hoveniers, personal trainers, loodgieters, klussers, schoonheidsspecialisten, timmermannen, stukadoors, koks and similar businesses.

## Who it is not mainly for

The standard package is primarily a complete business website for a service business. More extensive projects such as a webshop, online course with payments, or multi-package/custom sites are handled as maatwerk with separate pricing.

## Pricing

All listed prices are excluding VAT.

Site in a Box (single plan):

- Yearly billing (best value): €190 per year upfront (about €16 per month). Saves €38 per year versus monthly billing.
- Monthly billing: €19 per month, paid monthly and cancellable.
- Includes: professional website, ready for Google and ChatGPT, fast loading, secure and reliable hosting, .nl domain free for the first year (or connect your current domain), self-edit texts and photos, Dutch support.
- Optional: business email.

## Payment and approval model

Site in a Box works with a no-cure-no-pay approval model. The customer sees a test version first, for example on a siteinabox.nl subdomain. Only after explicit approval does Site in a Box send the invoice and put the site live. If the customer does not approve, they do not pay.

## Ownership and editing

The customer owns their domain and content. The domain name is put in the customer's name. Texts, photos and business information can be exported and taken elsewhere.

Site in a Box builds and hosts the website in its own system. Customers can edit common content themselves through the management environment, such as opening hours, prices, photos, texts and services.
